title: Planned power outage: Pacaltsdorp
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of Pacaltsdorp on Wednesday and Thursday 11-12 February from 08:00 to 16:00 for alterations to the electrical mains.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of Pacaltsdorp on Wednesday and Thursday 11-12 February from 08:00 to 16:00 for alterations to the electrical mains."},{"type":"heading","text":"The following areas will be affected:","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pump station ASeveral other sewer pump stations in PacaltsdorpSurrounding residential properties","html":"
  • Pump station A
  • Several other sewer pump stations in Pacaltsdorp
  • Surrounding residential properties
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period.","html":"Consumers are warned to treat the installation as being live for the full duration as the supply may be resumed at any time within the notified period."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Should circumstances prevent the work being carried out during the abovementioned period, the work will be done on Wednesday and Thursday 18-19 February from 08:00 to 16:00."}]
